kpi_results.kpi: audit_findings_resolved (F-04 Email/Log Call no-op, F-05 12+ no-op buttons, F-06 Log Activity submit no-op, F-23 zero useMutation calls)
kpi_results.actual: Resolved. The 2026-03-05 audit was STALE: F-23 (zero useMutation) and F-06 (Log Activity submit) were already resolved by prior sibling tasks (the page already had 5 useMutation calls + a wired QuickLogComposer). The genuinely-dead buttons remaining were wired: Email -> EmailCompose sheet; Log Call -> contact.logActivity({type:'CALL'}) dialog (await + close-on-success, length-bounded); Add Deal -> /deals/new?contactId (matches the contact-list pattern); View Map -> Google Maps from the contact's composed streetAddress/city/zipCode (codex caught the stale location:'' — now wired). The no-op Play Recording + document Download buttons were REMOVED (no populated data source; Play Recording also opened an unvalidated URL). Activity Reply/React/Share were verified already-wired via ActivityFeedItemActions.

kpi_results.kpi: test_coverage >=90% on changed source (Sonar new_coverage >=80% on changed lines)
kpi_results.actual: diff-coverage (new_coverage) = 81.8% (45/55 changed lines) — above the 80% floor. The four extracted/changed component+helper modules are 100% covered (ContactQuickActions 29/29, ContactMapPreview 3/3, ContactAddDealButton 3/3, contact-detail-actions 10/10) by 56 new tests. Route page.tsx (10 thin added lines) is excluded from the merged coverage report (root vitest.config.ts), so all wiring logic was extracted into tested components — the same pattern as IFC-256. Full coverage 85.54% -> 85.75%.

definition_of_done_items.evidence: Already wired before this task (QuickLogComposer -> contact.logActivity, page.tsx). IFC-257 adds the header Log Call dialog -> contact.logActivity({type:'CALL'}) via ContactQuickActions (mutateAsync, close-on-success). Tests: ContactQuickActions.test.tsx 'logs the call with the CALL payload', 'closes the dialog after a successful log', 'keeps the dialog open ... when the mutation fails'.

ContactQuickActions Email button opens an EmailCompose sheet (Sheet + EmailCompose, initialTo = contact email, SheetTitle for a11y); disabled when no email. Test: 'opens an EmailCompose sheet with an accessible name and the contact email pre-filled'.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Add Note wired to addNote mutation
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Already wired before this task (Notes-tab + sidebar Add Note -> contact.addNote, page.tsx). No change needed; verified still functional (existing page tests green).

ContactAddDealButton navigates to /deals/new?contactId=<id> (matching the contact-list ContactsPageClient.tsx:455 pattern). Tests: ContactAddDealButton.test.tsx 'navigates to /deals/new with the contact context'; page test 'mounts the Add Deal action with the contact context in the deals tab'. Pre-fill consumption by the create-deal page (needs DealForm account context) tracked as follow-up #405 / debt-ledger CONTACT-ADD-DEAL-PREFILL-001.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: activity action buttons functional or removed
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Activity Reply/React/Add-Note/Share are already functional via ActivityFeedItemActions + useActivityReactions/useActivityComments (page.tsx:1629). The two genuinely-no-op activity-preview buttons (Play Recording, document Download) were REMOVED — neither has a populated data source in the contact activity feed (no call-recording integration; no download URL in activity metadata).
diff-coverage 81.8% >= 80% floor; extracted components 100% covered. pre-ship PASS (unit + integration + coverage + diff-coverage + build).

definition_of_done_items.criterion: >=12 buttons wired to real actions; >=2 useMutation calls on page
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Already exceeded before this task (the page had 5 useMutation calls + many wired buttons). IFC-257 additionally wires Email, Log Call, Add Deal, View Map (and removes 2 dataless no-ops).

invariants_acknowledged: Never mock/simulate data: the no-op Play Recording + document Download buttons were removed because the contact activity feed has no populated data source for them — rather than wiring them to fake/absent data.

Route page.tsx is excluded from the merged coverage report (root vitest.config.ts), so all wiring logic was extracted into unit-tested components (ContactQuickActions, ContactMapPreview, ContactAddDealButton, contact-detail-actions) — the page is a thin consumer (10 added lines).
Minimal change: only the genuinely-dead buttons were wired/removed; no unrelated refactor. logActivity/addNote mutations and 5 useMutation calls already existed (audit was stale).
No apps/api change: every needed mutation/route already existed; this is a frontend-only task (no overlap with the parallel accounts agent).

notes: IFC-257 — Contact Detail action-button wiring (audit F-04/F-05/F-06/F-23). The 2026-03-05 audit was STALE: logActivity/addNote mutations + 5 useMutation calls + Add Note + QuickLogComposer were already wired by prior sibling tasks (IFC-220/253/256/227), so F-23/F-06 were already resolved and the DoD numeric thresholds (>=2 useMutation, >=12 buttons) were already met. IFC-257 wired the genuinely-dead buttons: Email -> EmailCompose sheet, Log Call -> contact.logActivity({type:'CALL'}) dialog, Add Deal -> /deals/new?contactId, View Map -> Google Maps from the contact's composed address; and REMOVED the two no-op buttons with no data source (Play Recording, document Download). COVERAGE ARCHITECTURE: route page.tsx is excluded from the merged coverage report (root vitest.config.ts:335), so all wiring was extracted into unit-tested components — ContactQuickActions (self-contains the logActivity mutation + Email sheet + Log Call dialog), ContactMapPreview, ContactAddDealButton, and the contact-detail-actions helpers (buildDealNewHref, buildContactLocation, buildContactMapsHref, formatContactFullName) — all 100% covered. page.tsx is a thin consumer (10 added lines). diff-coverage 81.8% (45/55) >= 80%. CODEX SEMANTIC-REVIEW GATE caught 3 real issues, all fixed: (1) Log Call cleared inputs before the mutation resolved -> now mutateAsync + close-on-success + maxLength bounds; (2) the contact's address fields (streetAddress/city/zipCode, returned by getById) were thrown away by a stale location:'' hardcode -> View Map now opens Maps for the real address; (3) Play Recording opened an unvalidated metadata URL -> removed. One scope finding (Add Deal create-deal pre-fill) waived (codex flip-flopped across runs) and tracked as a pre-existing, both-entry-point gap in issue #405 / debt-ledger CONTACT-ADD-DEAL-PREFILL-001. PRE-SHIP PASS in 18m37s (unit-tests, integration-tests, coverage, coverage-floor, diff-coverage, build, audit, architecture, validate-sprint-data, codex-review all green). nav_wiring_confirmed: no new route/page — this wires buttons on the already-reachable /contacts/[id] route (sidebar configs/contacts.ts; parent ContactsPageClient.tsx:452). PRD docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md referenced; ADR N/A (no new architecture).
